mwr.shortDescription: Might With Right—the principle that domination is legitimate when exercised through justified means across four levels.
mwr.fullDescription: MWR = Might With Right. The framework for how domination can be 'right' or 'with rights' through four levels: Level 1: Right through voluntary exchange (will-economics), Level 2: Right through chosen governance (Crucible/Triad sovereignty), Level 3: Right through structured competition (MoWD games), Level 4: Right through ultimate reality (MIRA - when all other means exhausted).

mowd.shortDescription: Metagame of World Dynamics—gamification framework for will-against-will conflict resolution through structured competition.
mowd.fullDescription: MoWD = Metagame of World Dynamics. MWR Level 3 general framework—a set of gamifications of will-against-will, might-against-might, magic-against-magic, intellect-against-intellect, performance-against-performance. Encapsulates all political philosophies in a gamification framework: 'What is the game and the rules of the game in which we battle will-against-will and see conquest and defeat of individual lives and civilizational shift through.' Examples: MMA fights, chess tournaments, video game competitions, wargames, epic confrontations like Achilles vs Boagrius.

mwd.shortDescription: Moral Warfare Doctrine—specific application of MoWD for warfare that eliminates death through non-lethal combat and respawn systems.
mwd.fullDescription: MWD = Moral Warfare Doctrine. MWR Level 3 specific application for warfare—structured competition framework where warfare becomes non-lethal combat with respawn systems, real stakes, but no permanent death. Solves disputes through gamified warfare rather than actual killing. A way to eliminate death from war while maintaining the power display and conflict resolution functions of warfare.

aeda.shortDescription: Amorality except Death Alliance — amoral agreement for alliance that goes beyond even MIRA and states only "¬Death Action". The Widest Possible Tent Against Death. Nothing Else. It is tied explicitly to MWR 4 de-escalation into MWR 3 border: MWD

mira.shortDescription: Might is Right Alliance—amoral agreement for alliance when you cannot prevent others from racing to Position 0, ensuring acceptable loss if they win.
mira.fullDescription: MIRA = Might is Right Alliance. An amoral agreement to make an Alliance that is sufficient to allow the others of mutually assured destruction to 'forge their destiny' insofar they are sufficient trustworthy that ones Hearth and things like 1234♥️0♠️4321 are kept intact for eternity. When you cannot stop someone from achieving Position 0 (ultimate technological power), you make an alliance ensuring acceptable loss if they win. Acceptable Loss = 1234♥️0♠️4321 + Trustworthiness + THAT Hearth + Hilltop Merit. Only with all four components does losing to someone achieving Position 0 become acceptable. It is not a standalone system but an APPLICATION of multiple frameworks (NSS, Crucible, PoP, PoU, Trust Networks, Discovery OS) to solve the vulnerable world scenario.

position-0.shortDescription: Total life/death domination of ALL other life on the planet—can dominate everyone including those in bunkers/towers/castles. This is UNIPOLAR supremacy (only one such entity).
position-0.fullDescription: Position 0 represents achieving the Lord of Destruction position—TOTAL life/death domination of ALL other life on the planet. This is COMPLETELY DIFFERENT from Position O: Position 0 can dominate EVERYONE, including those in bunkers/towers/castles. Position 0 is UNIPOLAR—only one such entity can exist (when one achieves Position 0, they dominate all others including former Position O holders). Multiple paths lead there: AGI breakthrough, synthetic biology monopoly, nanotechnology, quantum computing supremacy, high-energy physics control. Position 0 means: Overwhelming power matching the '0' in 1234♥️0♠️4321, global domination capability over ALL physical reality (including protected spaces that are safe from Position O), responsibility to reign in Typhon (The Titan Representation of Cosmic Force: titanic chaotic forces), authority to set rules within Shield/Sword constraints, burden of judging when necessity overrides oaths, operating from unthreatened supremacy. This is the earthly equivalent of the Lord of Destruction position—not cosmically ultimate, but overwhelming within human realm. Even those in bunkers/towers/castles are NOT safe from Position 0 (unlike Position O, where bunkers provide safety). MIRA is suggested as a solution when Position 0 (unipolarity) cannot be achieved—allowing for alliance structure among competing powers.

position-o.shortDescription: Extreme dominating capacity only on 'normal persons' not in protected bunkers—the tragic condition of many unknown/hidden Os with plausible deniability, able to hurt/kill/ruin you, with the growing list of those capable. Multipolar dread.
position-o.fullDescription: Position O (O as in domination, zero freedom for normal subjects): The technological capacity to impose your will on everyone who isn't hidden in a doomsday bunker or protected tower. This is the CONSEQUENCE OF MULTIPOLARITY (When you can not prevent the random biological researched from pairing HIV with Corona Virus) — the tragic condition where we progress into deeper, more easy and automatic, and more plausibly deniable hurting and controlling and dominating of 'the normal persons' while the ones hiding in bunkers, protected by castle and in their towers remain safe from Os (but NOT from Position 0). The DREAD: You face many unknown/hidden Position O holders—30,000+ Towers protected by Castles, each capable of extreme to total domination over you. You don't know WHO has this power—it could be governments, corporations, hidden Towers, or 'all those they allow to sit upon such positions in relation to your countries.' You MUST obey or play nice towards these hidden or known powers, knowing they can hurt you severely, ruin your life (bioweapons, digital account destruction, infrastructure cut-off), or kill you—and they can do it with plausible deniability. The list grows and grows of those capable. This is the terrible feeling of multipolarity reaching this condition: normal persons can be 'sapped to death' or hurt by bioweapons or have their accounts/digital aspects ruined totally by any of the MAD (Mutually Assured Destruction) multipolar actors. Many other O positions exist from Towers (technological development organizations) protected by Castles (the might part that makes conquering them infeasible). The ONLY escape: Hide in bunkers deep enough that Position O holders cannot reach you. Those in bunkers are safe from Os but NOT from Position 0. MIRA is suggested as a solution to this multipolar dread—when unipolarity (single Position 0) cannot be achieved, MIRA provides a framework for the inevitable alliance structure.
position-o.definitionFile: /?f=49 Position O - The Coming Age of Multiple Absolute Dominators.md

triad.shortDescription: Three-part structure: (Sovereign/Authority, Halo/Law/Scripture, Substratum/People). Useful projection for analyzing governance experiments.
triad.fullDescription: A Triad has three components: 1) Sovereign (authority, ♦ systematic or ♣ living), 2) Halo (law/scripture—what others read to understand what they proclaim to believe or have as law), 3) Substratum (people, organisms, machinery, place, material). This is a useful projective analysis of a Triad—a nice projection that allows for a sort of 'unique key' to separate which governance experiments have been run before. It isn't deep or holistically complete, though it is easily tangible. Related to Routing of places and understanding where you are and what that place is like.

triadization.shortDescription: The mechanism for non-destructive unions where parts remain distinct while cooperating—voluntary association with sovereignty and somewhere free (MBC Rule 3).
triadization.fullDescription: Triadization = The mechanism for non-destructive unions where parts remain distinct while cooperating. A Triad is a voluntary association with exclusive territory, shared governance/culture/values. Key principles: Sovereignty (absolute, no permission needed—ONE person is enough to form a Triad), somewhere free (MBC Rule 3: must allow them to leave for alternatives if they want to), natural selection (viable ones flourish, failed experiments dissolve). Enables governance experiments while preserving diversity—Triads can be nested spatially or hierarchically without destroying constituent parts. The Crucible implements Triadization as its core mechanism—the voluntary sovereignty marketplace enables Triadization at scale.

sovereignty.shortDescription: Absolute authority over territory—no permission needed. ONE person can establish sovereignty by claiming territory.
sovereignty.fullDescription: Sovereignty = Absolute authority over territory within a Triad. No permission needed to establish—ONE person is enough. Two types: ♣ (Living) = specific person's will-field dominates, ♠ (Systematic) = algorithmic/function-based rule. Sovereignty can be nested (outer Triad has outer sovereignty controlling borders, inner Triad has inner sovereignty controlling within borders). Can be subordinated hierarchically (plug-and-play pyramids) or spatially (embedded territories).

halo.shortDescription: Law/Scripture component of Triad—what others read to understand what the Triad proclaims to believe or have as law (right and wrong).
halo.fullDescription: Halo = The law/scripture component of a Triad. What others read to understand what the Triad proclaims to believe or have as law (right and wrong, values, rules). Part of the Triad's three-component structure (Sovereign, Halo, Substratum). The proclaimed Halo may differ from actual practices (Substratum), but it's what the Triad publicly claims. Used in routing symbols to understand what laws and values you'll encounter.
halo.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

substratum.shortDescription: People/organisms/machinery component of Triad—the actual beings, place, and material that make up the Triad.
substratum.fullDescription: Substratum = The people/organisms/machinery component of a Triad. The actual beings (people, organisms), place (territory), and material (infrastructure, resources) that make up the Triad. Part of the three-component structure (Sovereign, Halo, Substratum). The actual daemons and their expression, as distinct from the proclaimed Halo (what they say) or Sovereign structure (who rules).
substratum.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

routing.shortDescription: Navigation through will-field topology using symbolic notation like 1230321 or 101—understanding where you are and what that place is like.
routing.fullDescription: Routing = Navigation through will-field topology using symbolic notation. Symbols like 1230321 or 101 encode information about what laws, cultures, and requirements you'll encounter in any given sovereignty. Maps the will-field topology, showing where different archetypal patterns dominate and how trust networks connect them. Examples: 1234♥[CENTER]♠4321 where 1234 = protection floor, ♥ = preference, [CENTER] = sovereignty type, ♠ = baseline, 4321 = open sky. Helps you understand where you are and what that place is like before entering.

fountain.shortDescription: Water-1: beyond daemonic alignment into total biological/phenotypic homogeneity (homoallelic purity).
fountain.fullDescription: Fountain = Water hierarchy level 1—beyond mere daemonic alignment into total biological/phenotypic homogeneity. Homoallelic: Essentially identical genetics (spawn is reproduction, not offspring). Extreme coherence: 'All dimensions of a human kind/expression/phenotype at once.' Typically 10-500 individuals. Only de novo mutations create novelty. Genetic purity verifiable through genetics—the only objectively measurable water level. Very rare in modern world (requires intense endogamy for generations).
fountain.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

spring.shortDescription: Water-2: single daemon type with intense coherence. Most sustainable level for daemon persistence.
spring.fullDescription: Spring = Water hierarchy level 2—single daemon type with intense coherence. Purest daemon expression without requiring biological homogeneity. Most sustainable level for daemon persistence (can absorb some mixing believed to be essentially the same daemon without collapse). Typically 50-5,000 individuals. Strong selection, deep resonance, clear boundaries. Members feel 'these are my people.' Most Springs are heteroallelic (genetically mixed) yet people with similar daemons naturally come together and maintain shared aesthetic/values/practices - daemon is innate and cannot be transmitted, but expressions of daemon (aesthetics, values, practices) can be shared.
spring.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

river.shortDescription: Water-3: few compatible daemon types coexisting in harmonious patterns (Dunbar number parallel of distinct types).
river.fullDescription: River = Water hierarchy level 3—few compatible daemon types coexisting in harmonious patterns. Dunbar number parallel of distinct daemon types—compatible but distinct, coexisting in same Triad. Key quality: 'spiral style intermingling' (harmonious, ebbs-flowing, branching), NOT 'tv-noise map' chaos. Dynamic interaction between types. Typically 100-10,000 individuals. Different daemon types flow between each other, create hybrid forms while maintaining distinct identities.
river.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

lake.shortDescription: Water-4: many types coexisting in complementary harmony (daemon diversity as symphony). Often manifests as cities.
lake.fullDescription: Lake = Water hierarchy level 4—many types coexisting in complementary harmony, daemon diversity bound by symphonic structure. Often manifests as cities or large towns (urban environments where 6-20+ daemon types concentrate). Typically 10,000-1 million individuals. Symphonic principle: Each daemon type = archetypical instrument, harmony not unison, different notes create beauty together. WARNING: Lakes are UNSTABLE long-term (destructive to constituent daemons over generations through exogamy and convergence).
lake.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

sea.shortDescription: Water-5: civilization-scale coherent daemon families (distinct color families with clear aesthetic differences).
sea.fullDescription: Sea = Water hierarchy level 5—civilization-scale coherent daemon families. Distinct color families with clear aesthetic differences (Western, Islamic, Confucian, African). Typically millions to tens of millions. Multiple Seas exist within Oceans. Each Sea has distinct cultural, linguistic, religious, aesthetic coherence despite internal diversity. Examples: Germanic Sea, Latin Sea, Slavic Sea (within Western Ocean).
sea.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

ocean.shortDescription: Water-6: Intuitives of Ocean in relation to our World.
ocean.fullDescription: Macro-civilizational families. Distinct color families: Western Ocean (cool blues/purples), Islamic Ocean (warm golds/ambers), Confucian Ocean (jade greens), African Ocean (rich earth reds/browns). Pragmatic unity despite incompatibility between Seas. Ocean binding (◊) unites incompatible Seas through economic, military, trade, or defensive forces. Typically tens to hundreds of millions.
ocean.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

world.shortDescription: Water-7: In oughts: Shared aversion though not assertion. (Negative Morality). Shared assertion of Truths. (Not only an enabling part to Pragmatics, though also, fundamental in shared 'landscape')
world.fullDescription: Worlds are to be thought very intuitively in the sense of colloqial semantic. It provides a set of 'realities true to it', things about its existence and manifestation. While at the same time, it includes a set of oughts 'against' or prevented. Things like 'no one may kill' or 'no one may die'. (Of course you can flip it: everyone must be innocent of murder, every must live perpetually. Though the point should come across still: Aversions of 'bad things' and statements/desires of 'truths' / 'landscape'. Which together provides a sense of Worldness)
world.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

planetary.shortDescription: Water-8: The greatest inclusion territory, where anyone is welcomed, and so few rules can be agreed upon without opposition of oppression. Hopefully, 123 MBC. The lawlessness land.
planetary.fullDescription: In Planetary land, almost no law exists, and so it is 'natural anarchy'. One can imagine, however, someone managing to dominate all such territory into lawed. Though, naturally it is anarchic. Beyond this, total sovereignty. All modern nations (American, German, etc.) are Planetary entities (territory + totally void intersective willed law). Contains within them all water levels: Seas, Oceans, Lakes, Rivers, Springs, Fountains. Typically billions of people.
planetary.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

eudaemonia.shortDescription: An 'ia' (place of...) — a daemon as collective by sufficient proximity or complementarity and their good (eu) expressed in a land that is theirs (ia).
eudaemonia.fullDescription: Eudaemonia = An 'ia' (place of...) where their daemon good nature (eu = good) is expressed in a land that is theirs (ia = place). Their daemon flourishing in their place—living according to your true nature in land aligned with that nature. Related to but distinct from Eudaimonia (which we leave for whatever ancient Greeks used it as, not what modern scholars want it to mean).
eudaemonia.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

eudaimonia.shortDescription: Ancient Greek term—left for whatever ancient Greeks used it as, not what modern scholars want it to mean.
eudaimonia.fullDescription: Eudaimonia = Ancient Greek term. We leave this for whatever we can find the ancient Greeks used it as, and not what some modern scholar wants it to mean. The distinction from Eudaemonia is preserved: Eudaemonia refers to daemon-interrelating flourishing (place where daemon expresses), while Eudaimonia is left to historical Greek usage.
eudaimonia.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

historiography.shortDescription: The 'mapping' of historical facts—filling out things between and a bit beyond what we can state from facts alone. Storytelling within facts.
historiography.fullDescription: Historiography = The 'mapping' of historical facts or history. It is 'filling out things between and a bit beyond what we can state from facts alone.' It is storytelling that one believes is accurate or within the historical facts. Non-violating them. The writing (graphia) about the investigation (history). History = the investigation and evidence (what documents exist, what archaeologists found). Historiography = how you write about that evidence (interpretation, narrative, meaning). Multiple historiographies can coexist—each group has their own aejective historical narrative.

multaiddaemon.shortDescription: Like perfect 'democratic' machinery—takes many daemons and finds best collectivization so they can act as one with force. Solves disputes virtually.
multaiddaemon.fullDescription: Multaiddaemon = Like the perfect 'democratic' machinery. Takes many daemons and finds the best suitable collectivization of their daemons so they can act as one with force. It is solving all disputes in virtual land and acting as one outwardly. Instead of allowing will against will in reality to occur. Aggregated will-field generator that represents collective will of multiple individuals without revealing ANY individual's specific will. Privacy innovation: complete individual invisibility + complete pattern visibility.

aejectivity.shortDescription: Shared subjective experiencing—what a group experiences together. Objective within group, subjective between groups.
aejectivity.fullDescription: Aejectivity = SHARED subjective experiencing. Not just individual experience (subjectivity) or universal truth (objectivity), but inter-subjective agreement—what a group shares together. Truth that is objective WITHIN a group, subjective to outsiders. Hierarchy: Subjectivity (one person) → Aejectivity (group shares) → Objectivity (everyone agrees). A Phase = package of aejectivities that activate together for coherence.

aejective.shortDescription: Adjective form of aejectivity—describes shared group experience.
aejective.fullDescription: Describes truths or experiences that are aejective—shared within a group, objective to group members, but may be disputed by outsiders. Examples: 'This is beautiful' (aesthetic aejectivity), 'Jesus is risen' (religious aejectivity), 'Holocaust was 6M' (historical aejectivity).

aiddaemon.shortDescription: Your Artificial Intelligence MIRROR—allows you to gain advantage of other intelligence. Learns your daemon through observation to 'simply get you' with minimal words needed.
aiddaemon.fullDescription: AIdDaemon = AI Aid Daemon. Your Artificial Intelligence MIRROR—allows you to gain advantage of other intelligence (machine nanoscale decisions, macroscale connectivity) and its unlocking capacities in affecting the world. Learns your daemon (true will, core nature) through observation to 'simply get you' with minimal words needed. Your AI surrogate that can stand in your place, never judges (only reflects). Trained on patterns and behaviors or anything else you can imagine, to better mirror *who you are*. Commonly used to simulate scenarios with you in it, predict, and communicate will; or doing microtransactions and interactions as if you could act in gigabyte throughput and nanoscale frequency. Acts as daemon's representative in digital space. The goal: Have only one AIdDaemon that is as close to you as possible and totally subservient to you, constantly trying to figure out how it fails to 'be' you. Potentially if you have pwnership it can directly command actuators or other intelligence in fractal fashion by the Subaiddaemonic abstraction; it could extend all the way down to very simple machinery, like a simple semaphore, all wrapped as subaiddaemons. A functional version of Jord would contain many Subaiddaemons (ideally one per person; where the sub part refers to 'what the person is willing to share when simulating/communicating or instantiating itself in another's Jord game)). To allow for good prediction capacity of events and what coalescence ought to be sought. The Ideal will not happen, see Trust Networks and 12 Will Coalescence Privacy chapters.

daemon.shortDescription: The thing-in-itself you are—your will's deepest pattern, your aesthetic-moral core, what beauty means to you, what suffering you'll accept, what joy you seek.
daemon.fullDescription: Daemon = A representation of True will, core nature, authentic self. daemon = The thing-in-itself you are.  Your will's deepest pattern, your aesthetic-moral core, what beauty means to you, what suffering you'll accept, what joy you seek. NOT the same as personality (surface) or identity (constructed), but your fundamental archetypal spirit. All that is experienced as 'you' though not including the experiencer. It is the carnal cage, the mind theater and bodily sensation, the material substrate through which will manifests. The noumenal will-essence — what a being actually *IS* at the deepest level.

daemonic.shortDescription: Relating to or driven by daemon—fundamental nature and true will.
daemonic.fullDescription: Adjective describing things related to daemon—fundamental nature, true will, authentic being. Used in contexts like 'daemonic alignment' (compatibility between daemons), 'daemonic architecture' (designing systems around daemon patterns), 'daemonic clustering' (natural grouping by daemon type).

will-coalescence.shortDescription: Process where intra- and inter- will combine/align to amplify and avoid deamplification — matching desires to opportunities and higher will.
will-coalescence.fullDescription: Will-coalescence = Process where individual wills combine, align, or resonate to manifest reality. Three types: Harmonic (like resonating), Complementary (puzzle pieces), Convergent (paths merging). Jord facilitates will-coalescence by matching individual desires to opportunities. The side-effect is will-disentanglement — conflicts causes actual divergence; due to the asymmetry of destruction/theft/etc in relation to creation or building, will-disentanglement or 'being without others' is much more important to manifesting your will. One bad person in the mix and you can lose all you built. Burnt down. Though when the coalescent part is important, it is 'fail-safe' and 'gradual improvements by better coalescence'. Instead of domination one seeks natural alignment that most efficient causes your will to be able to manifest -- in the acute, chronic and eternal.

phase.shortDescription: Package of aejectivities that activate together—sufficient and necessary list of shared experiences.
phase.fullDescription: A Phase = Sufficient and necessary list of aejectivities active together. Can be: Temporal phases (time-sharing same space), Reality phases (AR skinning modes), or Archetypal phases (stellar compositions). All aejectivities in a phase activate/deactivate as a package for coherence. Example: Muslim Phase at Temple Mount = AR shows Al-Aqsa + Islamic law applies + 'Our holy site' belief + Arabic language—all activate together.

phase-engine.shortDescription: System managing transitions between different phases—temporal, reality, or archetypal modes.
phase-engine.fullDescription: The Phase Engine manages transitions between different phases. Handles temporal phasing (time-sharing), reality phasing (AR mode switching), and archetypal phasing (stellar composition changes). Ensures smooth transitions and coherence within each phase. Preserves geometry while allowing different groups to experience same space differently through AR overlays.

mbc.shortDescription: Minimal Benevolence Codex—3 base rules: (1) death avoided, (2) no extreme suffering, (3) somewhere free.
mbc.fullDescription: MBC = Minimal Benevolence Codex. Three base rules: (1) Death avoided—you can't kill (no death, no murder, no execution). (2) No extreme suffering—you can't do harm that has permanent or extreme suffering aspects (no torture, no maiming, no irreversible damage). (3) Somewhere free—you have to allow them to leave for whatever world is open to them (alternatives) if they want to (freedom of exit always). MBC+ extends with Rule 4: Autonomy and integrity (you cannot cut off parts to their body or inject them with chemicals and so on). Minimum constraints for maximum freedom within Triad coexistence. The 123 in routing symbols (1234♥[CENTER]♠4321) represents MBC hopeful for planetary adoption—minimal agreements enabling universal movement.

mbc+.shortDescription: Extended Minimal Benevolence Codex—includes Rule 4: Autonomy of self-identification.
mbc+.fullDescription: MBC+ = Extended Minimal Benevolence Codex. Includes base MBC rules plus Rule 4: Autonomy of self-identification (you can claim any identity). Different Triads may adopt different MBC+ variations. Extensions beyond the three base rules while maintaining minimum constraints principle.
mbc+.definitionFile: /?f=85 Your 'I' - MBC Rule 4 and the Autonomy of Self-Identification.md

friend-enemy.shortDescription: Framework: Enemy = one who prevents you from organizing power. Friend = one who allows/facilitates it.
friend-enemy.fullDescription: The Enemy-Friend framework: Starts from the individual attempting to organize power. Enemy = One who prevents you from organizing power (because they can). Friend = One who allows, facilitates, or manifests your power. Revealed through Tower attempts, not stated relations. Inverts traditional friend-enemy thinking by focusing on prevention capability rather than existential threat, and revealed preference through action rather than stated relations.
friend-enemy.definitionFile: /?f=51b What is New - The MIRA Friend-Enemy Framework.md

nss.shortDescription: Natural Selection Systems—performance-based infrastructure selection replacing capital command.
nss.fullDescription: NSS = Natural Selection Systems. Performance-based infrastructure selection replacing capital command with domain-specific performance measurement. Natural selection through infrastructure availability—successful patterns get resources, failed experiments dissolve. Replaces bureaucratic allocation with performance-based access. Capital follows demonstrated success rather than planned allocation.

jord.shortDescription: Earth coordination platform—handles terrestrial Triadization, AR/LLL, historiography.
jord.fullDescription: Jord = Earth system (terrestrial coordination, present reality, physical world). Handles Earth Triads, terrestrial coordination, AR/LLL experiences, historiography. Contains many Aiddaemons (one per person). Implements NSS principles—successful Triads rise in visibility, resources flow to proven patterns. Different from Sol (cosmic/catastrophe-oriented). Together, Sol-Jord is the complete integrated system.

sol.shortDescription: Solar/cosmic system—handles space colonization, asteroid defense, off-world coordination.
sol.fullDescription: Sol = Solar/cosmic system (space, catastrophe prevention, long-term). Handles space colonization, asteroid defense, cosmic threats, off-world Triads. Different from Jord (Earth-oriented). Together, Sol-Jord is the complete integrated system. Long-term existential risk management while Jord handles terrestrial coordination.

apotheosis.shortDescription: Divinity of man—becoming godlike through daemon expression and will manifestation.
apotheosis.fullDescription: Apotheosis = The divinity of man. Becoming godlike through full expression of your daemon and manifestation of your will. Achieving ultimate power and being through authentic self-realization. Living according to your true nature at its fullest expression—the becoming of our divinity.

polymorphism.shortDescription: Layers of meaning—multiple interpretations coexisting, especially in symbolic systems.
polymorphism.fullDescription: Polymorphism = Layers of meaning. Multiple valid interpretations coexisting simultaneously, especially in symbolic systems. Same symbol or concept can mean different things in different contexts or to different groups—all valid within their aejectivity. Enables rich symbolic communication where symbols carry multiple layers of meaning simultaneously.

will-field.shortDescription: Topological space mapping where different will-patterns dominate—understanding compatibility and navigation through will-space.
will-field.fullDescription: Will-Field = Topological space mapping where different will-patterns dominate. Understanding compatibility and navigation through will-space. Maps where different archetypal patterns (daemon types) are concentrated, how they interact, and where trust networks connect them. Enables routing—finding paths aligned with your daemon through will-field topology.

animaecracy.shortDescription: Rule through emergent will-alignment that over time finds stability and structure in daemon-aligned rule. Animaecracy is simultaneously a discovering process of daemons by proxy of such stability.
animaecracy.fullDescription: Animaecracy = Rule / Power Projection through person (old: institution + person) through will-alignment natural representative: daemon-aligned. Not democracy (votes), not meritocracy (merit ranking / credentials), but rather stability of will-coalescence through a person. Leaders emerge through consistent will-coalescence through a person; e.g. demonstrated capacity to guide toward shared beauty/values. This stability becomes an inferential 'proof' of daemon-alignment.

tower.shortDescription: Tower of Power (TOP)—persons seeking power through isolated technological progression. Independent capability for power-building.
tower.fullDescription: Tower = Tower of Power (TOP). Independent capability for power-building—your own infrastructure, resources, and sovereignty to manifest your will without depending on others' permission. Towers are about THE WHO (the persons in the Tower seeking POWER) through isolated technological progression that races ahead so powerfully they can project power onto the world. NOT domain-specific (not 'Engineering Tower' or 'Finance Tower'). The attempt to build a Tower reveals the friend-enemy distinction—who prevents you (enemies), who allows you (friends). Tower-building is the practical test of who truly supports vs opposes your power-seeking.
tower.definitionFile: /?f=49 Position O - The Coming Age of Multiple Absolute Dominators.md

pwnership.shortDescription: Exclusive control of things—actual, factual control. Contrasts with ownership (lawful accord on exclusive control).
pwnership.fullDescription: Pwnership = Exclusive control of things (actual, factual control). Contrasts with Ownership = lawful accord on exclusive control of things (legal/abstract claim). Who actually pwns something are the ones who control it—the ones wearing The Horns of power. The ones controlling the substrate are rarely the supposed owners. Ownership is often a Golden Laurel of Power—an abstraction. Pwnership is about actual control (1.0 = FULL SOVEREIGNTY with subdaemonic actuators, complete control). Variations: pwn (verb: to have actual control), pwned (past tense: controlled/dominated).

rally.shortDescription: Bottom-up power dynamics—people voluntarily rally to leaders they want, choosing which pyramid to join.
rally.fullDescription: Rally = Bottom-up power dynamics. People voluntarily rally to leaders they want (not assigned, but chosen). Choosing which pyramid to join based on daemon alignment. Rally dynamics enable plug-and-play subordination—you can switch which pyramid you're subordinate to based on which leader's daemon resonates with yours. Contrasts with top-down assignment of rulers.

top.shortDescription: Tower of Power—persons seeking power through isolated technological progression that races ahead so powerfully they can project power onto the world.
top.fullDescription: TOP = Tower of Power. Towers are about THE WHO (the persons in the Tower seeking POWER) through isolated technological progression that races ahead so powerfully they can project power onto the world. Not domain-specific (not 'Engineering Tower' or 'Finance Tower'). Each Tower contains persons racing ahead in technological progression (fusion, AGI, biotech, whatever their focus) so powerfully they can project power onto the world. With that power in whatever form it is (technological capability, economic leverage, military force, etc.), they have leverage and can affect changes upon the world.
top.definitionFile: /?f=49 Position O - The Coming Age of Multiple Absolute Dominators.md

ctop.shortDescription: Castle + Tower of Power—if strong enough, can achieve Position O without anyone being able to do anything about it (too costly to wage the might struggle against them).
ctop.fullDescription: CTOP = Castle + Tower of Power. Each Tower protected by Castle (bunker defenses, mutual deterrence with other CTOPs) can achieve O Position—they can't dominate other CTOPs (Castles protect each other through mutual deterrence), but they CAN dominate exposed populations (those not in bunkers). If a CTOP is strong enough unit, then they can achieve Position O without anyone being able to do anything about it (too costly to wage the might struggle against them—mutual assured destruction or 'too costly to attack' deterrence).
ctop.definitionFile: /?f=49 Position O - The Coming Age of Multiple Absolute Dominators.md

castle.shortDescription: Defensive capability protecting Tower—the might part that makes conquering them and destroying their Tower infeasible.
castle.fullDescription: Castle = The defensive capability protecting Tower. The might part that makes conquering them and destroying their Tower infeasible. Typically: Underground bunker (Cheyenne Mountain-style, 2,000+ feet rock overhead, blast-proof, bioweapon-filtered air), self-sufficient (fusion power, hydroponic farms, water recycling, 10+ year supplies), redundant (multiple locations, Tower core distributed, can't eliminate by striking one), Castle Kind (security force, 200-2,000 people, bred/trained for defense, loyal to Tower). Protects against: Drone strikes, bioweapons, precision weapons, infiltration, siege. Does NOT protect against Position 0 (nanotech, seismic weapons, AI omniscience, space bombardment).
castle.definitionFile: /?f=49a Life When Facing the Many Os - The Doomsday Bunker Civilization.md

stronghold.shortDescription: Castle in neocolonial or outpost setting—defensive capability protecting Tower in remote or contested territory.
stronghold.fullDescription: Stronghold = Castle in neocolonial or outpost setting. Defensive capability protecting Tower in remote or contested territory. Similar to Castle but emphasizes the outpost/colonial context where the Tower operates in territory not fully controlled or in hostile environment. The defensive infrastructure that makes the outpost defensible against local threats and distant powers.
stronghold.definitionFile: /?f=49a Life When Facing the Many Os - The Doomsday Bunker Civilization.md

bunker.shortDescription: Sufficient protection against O positions—deep underground shelter that blocks Position O capabilities (drones, bioweapons, precision strikes).
bunker.fullDescription: Bunker = Sufficient protection against O positions. Deep underground shelter (500-2,000+ feet rock overhead) that blocks Position O capabilities: Drone strikes (rock blocks), bioweapons (air filtered, isolated from surface), precision weapons (rock absorbs blast), infiltration (secured entrance, guards, screening). Self-sufficient (fusion/geothermal power, hydroponic farms, water from aquifers, 10-50 year supplies). Those in bunkers are safe from Os (Position O holders cannot reach them) but NOT from Position 0 (which can penetrate bunkers with nanotech, seismic weapons, etc.). The ONLY escape from Position O: Hide in bunkers deep enough that Position O holders cannot reach you.
bunker.definitionFile: /?f=49a Life When Facing the Many Os - The Doomsday Bunker Civilization.md

crucible.shortDescription: Voluntary sovereignty marketplace—replace voting with voluntary association, territory with sovereignty, uniformity with diversity.
crucible.fullDescription: The Crucible = Voluntary sovereignty marketplace system. Core innovation: Replace voting with voluntary association, territory with sovereignty, uniformity with diversity. Enables multiple sovereignty experiments running simultaneously, citizens choosing rulers by presence not ballots, natural selection between governance models, exit rights as the only universal rule. Every sovereignty operates within 1234♥️X♠️4321 structure (where X = sovereign type: ♣ human or ♦ system). Success through rallying and population growth; failure through exodus and abandonment. The competitive marketplace for governance—not imposed uniformity but voluntary choice between diverse systems.

pop.shortDescription: Proof of Person—establishes that pseudonyms represent real humans through accumulated witness testimony, without revealing identity.
pop.fullDescription: PoP = Proof of Person. Establishes that pseudonyms represent real humans through accumulated witness testimony, NOT through specific verification methods. Core mechanism: Real people witnessing other real people in physical space; accumulation of testimony creating 'network-strength-of-existence'; binding pseudonyms to persons who face real tit-for-tat consequences. Implementation examples: AR rhythm games requiring physical presence, shared meals with witness confirmation, collaborative physical tasks. Key properties: Sybil resistant (can't create unlimited fake identities), privacy preserving (personhood without identification), socially grounded (requires actual human interaction), reputation persistent (bad actors can't just create new identities). Enables trust without surveillance.

pou.shortDescription: Proof of Utility—ensures all value claims are validated by real humans with reputation at stake. Confirmation becomes blockchain mining mechanism.
pou.fullDescription: PoU = Proof of Utility. Ensures all value claims are validated by real humans with reputation at stake. Core mechanism: (1) Provider claims to deliver utility, (2) Real person (with PoP) requests utility, (3) Utility is provided (or not), (4) Real person confirms or denies delivery, (5) This confirmation becomes blockchain mining mechanism, (6) Trust scores update based on confirmation/denial patterns, (7) Disagreements cause trust map divergence. Creates ungameable verification: Providers can't fake utility delivery (real persons must confirm), false confirmations risk the confirmer's trust reputation, systematic disagreements cause trust clusters to naturally separate. This is THE mechanism that prevents gaming—every utility claim must be validated by a real person with reputation at stake.

trust-network.shortDescription: Voluntary information-sharing networks between trusted persons—functions like vetted agents in an intelligence network, enabling collective intelligence.
trust-network.fullDescription: Trust Network = Voluntary information-sharing networks between trusted persons. Functions like 'vetted agents in an intelligence network'—enables mapping of non-cooperating actors through chains of trust, collective intelligence through information flow, will-coalescence discovery, defensive overhead elimination (direct value exchange without verification costs), natural selection of value-destroying actors. NOT centralized trust scores—decentralized gossip with accountability through PoP. Each person has subjective trust assessment of others (multi-dimensional, contextual, relational). Information flows person-to-person, weighted by your trust in source. Witnessing creates information; you choose to share witnessed information with your trust network. PoP binding makes witnessing attributable (witness has reputation at stake). Trust networks aggregate witnessing into collective intelligence.

discovery-os.shortDescription: System that builds itself by discovering actual capabilities rather than assuming them—includes active forgetting for continued adaptability.
discovery-os.fullDescription: Discovery OS = System that builds itself by discovering actual capabilities rather than assuming them. Includes active forgetting for continued adaptability. The 'cog' wrapper of massive Aiddaemonic projecting subaiddaemons with machinery/utility actuators and interaiddaemonic will-economy. Instead of assuming hardware capabilities, Discovery OS discovers what's actually available. Instead of rigid specifications, it learns through interaction. Instead of fixed categories, it uses blob classes for pattern discovery. Enables will-manifestation infrastructure that adapts to actual reality rather than forcing reality into preconceived categories.

blob-class.shortDescription: Neural network approach to learning infinite-dimensional reality holistically without explicit features—captures patterns that resist naming/categorization.
blob-class.fullDescription: Blob Class = Neural network approach to learning infinite-dimensional reality holistically without explicit features. Captures patterns that resist naming/categorization. Alternative to categorization—learns nebulous patterns as ∞D clouds rather than reducing to 1D categories. Used for 'civilizational capacity,' 'trust,' 'aesthetic sense'—nebulae that can't be reduced to metrics. 'All things considered' approach that preserves ∞D structure. Enables will-topology navigation and eventually 'spell casting' (high-bandwidth communication). Blob classes learn patterns too complex for categorization, where explicit rules fail.

village.shortDescription: Support layer in Tower-Castle-Village architecture—enables Tower/Castle to focus by handling all support functions (food, maintenance, quality of life).
village.fullDescription: Village = Support layer in Tower-Castle-Village architecture. Enables Tower/Castle to focus by handling all support functions: Food production (hydroponic farms, culinary arts), maintenance (facilities, infrastructure), quality of life (housing, healthcare, aesthetics, cultural spaces), bootstrap labor (construction, logistics, operations). Without Village: Tower must cook/clean/administer (time wasted, not researching), Castle must maintain quality of life (time wasted, not training). With Village: Tower focuses 100% on research, Castle focuses 100% on defense. Long-term: Village reaps fruits of Tower breakthroughs (fusion energy, longevity, perfect tools). Village Kind = service-oriented persons selected/bred for enabling Tower/Castle specialization.
village.definitionFile: /?f=50 The Tower-Castle-Village Trust Architecture - Why Many Would Willingly Enable What Might Dominate Them.md

daiddaemon.shortDescription: daemon+aiddaemon fusion: Aiddaemonic semantic bridge—enables total vocabulary learning and private language comprehension beyond denotation/connotation.
daiddaemon.fullDescription: Daiddaemon = Aiddaemonic semantic bridge. Enables total vocabulary learning and private language comprehension beyond denotation/connotation. Captures nebulae (infinite-dimensional concepts) through learned context. Allows your Aiddaemon to understand your deep semantics (what you actually mean vs what you say). Enables true communication at last—translating between different humans' semantic nebulae. The Aiddaemon learns your complete semantic nebula through infinite dialogue, enabling inter-human bridging where aiddaemons translate between different humans' semantic spaces. This enables 'spell casting'—high-bandwidth communication where meaning is preserved.

subaiddaemon.shortDescription: Restricted subset of your Aiddaemon for privacy-preserving matching—can share with third-party matchmakers without revealing full daemon.
subaiddaemon.fullDescription: Subaiddaemon = Restricted subset of your Aiddaemon for privacy-preserving matching. Context-specific limited interfaces (DomainAiddaemon) for specific domains (romantic, business, political, etc.). You can share a Subaiddaemon with third-party matchmakers without revealing full daemon—enables compatibility assessment while maintaining privacy. Disclosure limits set based on domain and trust requirements. Trust level determines what aspects are disclosed. Can spawn multiple subaiddaemons for different contexts, each revealing only domain-relevant aspects. Stealth Subaiddaemon variants provide unlinkability when needed. Part of hierarchical extension: Aiddaemon → Subaiddaemons → very simple machinery, all wrapped in subaiddaemon abstraction.

routing-symbols.shortDescription: Symbolic notation like 1234♥[CENTER]♠4321 or 1230321—encodes information about laws, cultures, and requirements you'll encounter in any given sovereignty.
routing-symbols.fullDescription: Routing Symbols = Symbolic notation encoding will-field topology. Examples: 1234♥[CENTER]♠4321 where 1234 = protection floor (MBC), ♥ = preference/bias, [CENTER] = sovereignty type (♣ human or ♦ system), ♠ = baseline/respect, 4321 = open sky for aspiration. Or 1230321 (simple example). Or 101. Maps the will-field topology—showing where different archetypal patterns dominate and how trust networks connect them. Helps you understand where you are and what that place is like before entering. The 123 in routing symbols represents MBC hopeful for planetary adoption—minimal agreements enabling universal movement. Used in Crucible sovereignty navigation.

club-vs-diamond.shortDescription: ♣ = ONE will/animus (single sovereign human's will). ♦ = EVERYTHING ELSE (aggregations, systems, algorithms, protocols). ♣ must rule ♦.
club-vs-diamond.fullDescription: ♣ (Club) = ONE will/animus (single sovereign human's will). ♦ (Diamond) = EVERYTHING ELSE (aggregations, systems, algorithms, protocols, evolutionary agents). ♣ must rule ♦ (human sovereignty over systems). ♣s (plural clubs) = Anarchy of many sovereigns without aggregation. Democracy, meritocracy, algorithmic rule = ♦ (system rule). Animaecracy = ♣s coordinating voluntarily. Discovery OS keeps humans sovereign while using AI/algorithms as tools: Human will (♣) directs, AI/Aiddaemon (♦) assists, Trust networks verify, Reality reshapes. The specification tragedy applies to ♦ systems: They can only optimize finite specifications, sacrifice infinite unspecified dimensions.

heart-vs-spade.shortDescription: ♥ = Biased love (sacred preference creates otherworldly worth—'my children over all children'). ♠ = Universal baseline (respect for all, minimal rights like 123 MBC).
heart-vs-spade.fullDescription: ♥ (Heart) = Biased love (sacred preference creates otherworldly worth—'my children over all children'). ♠ (Spade) = Universal baseline (respect for all, minimal rights like 123 MBC). Springs need high ♥ (biased love for own kind). Planetary needs high ♠ (respect all humans minimally). Test: 1234♥♣♠4321 = Has both ♥ for own AND ♠ for others = Redeemed. Part of routing symbols structure: 1234♥[CENTER]♠4321 where ♥ = preference/bias toward own, ♠ = baseline respect for all. The balance between particular love (♥) and universal respect (♠) defines the Triad's relationship to insiders vs outsiders.

will-economics.shortDescription: Framework that reveals your will-topology and finds suitable pathways that fulfill you holistically—empowering you to actualize whatever matters to your daemon.
will-economics.fullDescription: Will-Economics = Framework that reveals your will-topology and finds suitable pathways that fulfill you holistically, empowering you to actualize whatever matters to your daemon (externalities, ethics, values, beliefs, emotions). Discovers positive-sum pathways when possible through truth revelation by fruits. Instead of systems exploiting your internal dynamics, will-economics reveals your will-topology and finds suitable pathways that fulfill you holistically. MWR Level 1: Right through voluntary exchange (will-economics). Enables navigating the background field of will interactions to find pathways where immediate desires serve deeper intentions. The solution to predatory systems—instead of systems exploiting your internal struggles, will-economics aligns with your authentic will.

horn.shortDescription: Raw Power—military might, economic dominance, technological supremacy. Used rarely, establishes order.
horn.fullDescription: Horn = Raw Power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Military might, economic dominance, technological supremacy. Used rarely, establishes order. The physical enforcement capability—the ones who actually control things (pwnership). Those 'wearing The Horns' are the ones with actual power. Part of symbolic encoding system: Horns (Raw Power), Caesarian Laurels (Institutional), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), Silver Crown (Horns+Institutional), Antlers (Horns+Devotional), Golden Crown (Horns+Institutional+Devotional).

laurels.shortDescription: Devotional power—earned respect, cultural authority, spiritual leadership. Most common sovereignty.
laurels.fullDescription: Laurels = Devotional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Earned respect, cultural authority, spiritual leadership. Most common sovereignty. Voluntary love/respect—people rally to those they admire. Contrasts with Horns (Raw Power) and Caesarian Laurels (Institutional). Part of symbolic encoding system: Horns (Raw Power), Caesarian Laurels (Institutional), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), Silver Crown (Horns+Institutional), Antlers (Horns+Devotional), Golden Crown (Horns+Institutional+Devotional). Also called 'Floral Laurels'—personal devotion that can die overnight with failure.

caesarian-laurels.shortDescription: Institutional power—coded law systems, bureaucratic structures, smart contracts, middle-tier governance.
caesarian-laurels.fullDescription: Caesarian Laurels = Institutional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Coded law systems, bureaucratic structures, smart contracts, middle-tier governance. Institutional authority through systems and rules rather than raw might (Horns) or earned respect (Laurels). Variations: 'caesarianly laureled' (adjective form), 'caesarianly laureled command' (command backed by institutional power). Part of symbolic encoding system alongside Horns (Raw Power), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), etc.

golden-laurels.shortDescription: Institutional+Devotional power—institutional backing combined with personal devotion. Any Caesar would claim devotionally Caesar!
golden-laurels.fullDescription: Golden Laurels = Institutional+Devotional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Institutional backing combined with personal devotion. Any Caesar would of course claim Devotionally Caesar! So they would all embellish and adorn themselves in Golden Laurels. Self-enforcing procedural authority that persists regardless of performance (unlike pure Laurels which die with failure). Creates 'distributed tyranny' where the system punishes deviation automatically. Part of symbolic encoding system alongside Horns, Caesarian Laurels, Laurels, Silver Crown, Antlers, Golden Crown.

silver-crown.shortDescription: Horns+Institutional power—raw might combined with coded authority systems.
silver-crown.fullDescription: Silver Crown = Horns+Institutional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Raw might (Horns) combined with institutional systems (Caesarian Laurels). Military/economic/technological supremacy backed by coded law systems, bureaucratic structures, smart contracts. Part of symbolic encoding system: Horns (Raw Power), Caesarian Laurels (Institutional), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), Silver Crown (Horns+Institutional), Antlers (Horns+Devotional), Golden Crown (Horns+Institutional+Devotional).

antlers.shortDescription: 🦌 = Horns+Devotional power—raw might combined with earned respect and cultural authority.
antlers.fullDescription: Antlers = Horns+Devotional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Raw might (Horns) combined with earned respect (Laurels). Military/economic/technological supremacy backed by voluntary love/respect—people rally to those with both power AND admirable character. Part of symbolic encoding system: Horns (Raw Power), Caesarian Laurels (Institutional), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), Silver Crown (Horns+Institutional), Antlers (Horns+Devotional), Golden Crown (Horns+Institutional+Devotional).

golden-crown.shortDescription: Horns+Institutional+Devotional power—complete power combining raw might, institutional systems, and earned respect.
golden-crown.fullDescription: Golden Crown = Horns+Institutional+Devotional power. One of the Power Types in Practice: Complete power combining raw might (Horns), institutional systems (Caesarian Laurels), and earned respect (Laurels). Military/economic/technological supremacy backed by coded authority AND voluntary devotion—the ultimate power combination. Part of symbolic encoding system: Horns (Raw Power), Caesarian Laurels (Institutional), Laurels (Devotional), Golden Laurels (Institutional+Devotional), Silver Crown (Horns+Institutional), Antlers (Horns+Devotional), Golden Crown (Horns+Institutional+Devotional).

metroversal.shortDescription: What is true ('universal') to a 'sorted subuniverse' of the universe.
metroversal.fullDescription: Universal WITHIN a specific cluster/civilization (not universal across all humanity). It does not seek to find the universally wanted imperatives, but rather tries to discover what 'metros' there are, by exploring what is categorical imperative to different persons. Then segmenting the 'universe' into many 'metros' where each have their own metroversals that is truly universal while in that metro. Brings stark degree of diversity in all things of organisms on the planet into Kant's universal aesthetics and imperatives. Also, it is a generative or discovering force for civilizational emergence. Where a sea may be highly opinionated and assertive in all from aesthetics to moralities. A World may be more relating to aversion or negative imperatives. 'I act to not steal, for I will it universal (metroversal) law'
metroversal.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

strata.shortDescription: Strata is the notion of dispersed flow upon the many. Ubiquitous flow upon the many. A 'generative' enrichment. It can take very general forms of blind dispersal, and it can take more deliberate and considerate forms.
strata.fullDescription: Such a deliberate form could be in relation to a technical implementation of archiecture first substrate, where everything is had at person to person accountable level. As such, strata can be perturbed or rewarded biasedly towards different schemes. As an example: Facilitating the verification of Proof of Persons generates strata output for that person. The most well-known strata is 'a vote' in the democratic currency system. It is supposed entirely unperturbed and equally distributed and 100% of the supply. Though it excludes a few types of persons: non-citizens, felons (?) and below-age-threshold. Where one could imagine including them in biased manner or having many different schemes, including not 100% of the supply.

daemonia.shortDescription: Spaces carved out in spacetime for aligned daemons—Triads where daemon harmony exists, avoiding incompatible daemons.
daemonia.fullDescription: Daemonia = Spaces carved out in spacetime for aligned daemons (Daemos = units of aligned will/emotion/soul/spirit). Triads where daemon harmony exists—avoiding incompatible daemons, only those highly complementary or similar. Springs, Rivers, Lakes are all Daemonias at different scales. NOT just territory—phase-separated reality where compatible daemons coalesce and incompatible ones separate. The Water Terminology lets us map our beliefs of Daemonia upon a Triad or nesting of Triads.
daemonia.definitionFile: /?f=44 The Fractal Water Hierarchy - Islands Within Islands Visualization.md

zero-externalities.shortDescription: Each Triad must contain ALL effects within its borders—no pollution, noise, violence, or costs crossing to other Triads.
zero-externalities.fullDescription: Zero Externalities = Each Triad must contain ALL effects within its borders—no pollution, noise, violence, or costs crossing to other Triads. Enables peaceful coexistence of incompatible systems. You can do ANYTHING within your Triad (above 123 MBC) as long as effects don't escape your borders. This is the practical mechanism that makes Triadization work—incompatible systems can exist side-by-side without conflict because each contains its own externalities. Essential for Crucible sovereignty—each experiment must be self-contained.

ship-metaphor.shortDescription: Higher-order consent framework—voluntary hierarchy with frictionless exit. Accept captain's authority while aboard, but can leave anytime.
ship-metaphor.fullDescription: The Ship Metaphor = Higher-order consent framework. 'Having embarked upon entering that ship or vessel, I shall accept the authority by the captain and the abrasive waves of the sea. But should I reject that higher order consent, then I can leave at any moment.' Voluntary hierarchy with frictionless exit—transforms dominance from trap into continuously renewed choice. Board the ship = Join sovereignty. Accept captain's authority = Ultimately sovereign is the law and the land. Weather storms = Endure decisions. One sacred right = Exit anytime. 'To refuse the domination of the Sovereign in a Triad amounts to: Exile/escape/exit.'

superficial.shortDescription: The visible—all that is visible, like the tattoos a person has gotten.
superficial.fullDescription: Superficial = The visible. All that is visible—like the tattoos a person has gotten, their appearance, their surface characteristics. The superficial is as it usually is: what you can see directly. Contrasts with Subficial (that which isn't visible, the depths) and Supraficial (that which allows you to infer subficial from superficial—when visible tells you about invisible). Historically, superficiality (taste) has converged with subficiality (truth) through natural and cultural selection—tastes that aligned with truth created fitness advantages. Markets often break this convergence by creating perfect superficials without underlying truth.

subficial.shortDescription: That which isn't visible—the depths of what a thing is, that isn't visible.
subficial.fullDescription: Subficial = That which isn't visible. The depths of what a thing is, that isn't visible. The hidden depths beneath the surface. Contrasts with Superficial (the visible) and Supraficial (that which allows inference from superficial to subficial—when visible translates into invisible depths). Example: A shark's predatory nature (subficial) isn't directly visible, but can be inferred from its teeth and eyes (superficial). Historically, subficiality (truth) has converged with superficiality (taste) through natural and cultural selection—truths that created fitness advantages became encoded in visible tastes. Markets often disconnect this convergence by presenting superficials without underlying truth.

supraficial.shortDescription: That which coheres through both visible and invisible—when you can infer depth (subficial) from surface (superficial). What makes the world have meaning to us.
supraficial.fullDescription: Supraficial = That which coheres through both visible and invisible. Supraficiality is when you can know things about the depths of a thing/being by its superficials. That the superficial translates into the subficial: That is the supraficials. What makes the world have meaning to us. What makes us able to see something and understand a trillion things all at once about what we saw. That form and depth are the same—when supraficial. The Veil of Maya is pierced when supraficial (form reveals depth). It is unpierced and fog of faithless form when exalting superficial away from the subficial (form doesn't reveal depth). Example: To see a 'shark' and know much about the depths of what it is. Or to see 'large sharp teeth and predator eyes' (superficial) and know much depth about what kind of subficial conditions in relation to killing other things it has. This is true whether we talk about things of reality (surrealism, abstract art) or beings (animal kingdom, understanding from form and face; transhumanist movement seeking supraficial intelligibility). Historically, supraficials emerged through natural and cultural selection—tastes (superficial) that aligned with truths (subficial) created fitness advantages over generations. Markets often break supraficials by creating perfect superficials without underlying truth. In the New World, Triadization, NSS, and Trust Networks can restore supraficials—taste can converge with truth again.

lewontins-antifallacy.shortDescription: As you add dimensions, differentiation increases. 1D → races overlap, 100D → races separate, ∞D → individuals unique.
lewontins-antifallacy.fullDescription: Lewontin's Antifallacy = As you add dimensions, differentiation increases. 1D → races overlap, 100D → races separate (Edwards), 1,000D → ethnicities separate, ∞D → individuals unique. Resolves race realism debate: Race real at population level (100D), individual uniqueness real at individual level (∞D). Both true simultaneously at different scales. At 1D, races appear similar (overlap in height). At 100D, races separate clearly (population-level differences). At ∞D, each individual is unique (no two people identical). This is why categorization (low-D) and individual recognition (high-D) both work but at different scales.

goodharts-law.shortDescription: When a measure becomes a target, it ceases to be a good measure. Optimizing on 1D metric causes gaming.
goodharts-law.fullDescription: Goodhart's Law = 'When a measure becomes a target, it ceases to be a good measure.' When you optimize on 1D metric (IQ, votes, trust score), people game the metric (optimize projection, ignore ∞D reality). Result: Metric diverges from nebula. Example: Corporate KPIs easily gamed ('Customer satisfaction scores' → employees beg for 10s, metrics meaningless). Why ♣ sovereignty avoids this: No fixed metric to game, holistic ∞D judgment. Blob classes preserve ∞D structure, can't be reduced to 1D metrics without losing meaning.

hearth.shortDescription: Specific territorial sovereignty that cannot be taken even in defeat. The sacred fire of identity that must never die—not abstract 'somewhere free' but THIS land, THESE boundaries.
hearth.fullDescription: Hearth = Specific territorial sovereignty that cannot be taken even in defeat. Not abstract 'somewhere free' but THIS land, THESE boundaries. The sacred fire of identity that must never die. Protected by MIRA compact—even Position 0 winner must respect your Hearth. Allows 'not winning never becomes losing' (maintain relative position, territory, worth). Hearth represents: The Sacred Fire (like ancient hearth-fires that must never die), Identity's Center (where your particular way of being can flourish), Territorial Sovereignty (actual mapped boundaries, not abstract 'rights'), The Unthreatened Space (protected even by Position 0's overwhelming might). 'Somewhere free and ♥️. Is general. Unspecified. Whereas having Hearth clause is in specificity. What is it that they get to keep in territorial terms.'

hilltop-merit.shortDescription: Spatial Reality Where your Merit Domains excellence maintains distinctive worth—NOT massified, NOT leveled into Pit. MIRA Component 4 ensures continued worth.
hilltop-merit.fullDescription: Hilltop Merit = Domain where your excellence maintains distinctive worth. NOT massified, NOT leveled into Pit. MIRA Component 4: Winner doesn't massify your innovations globally or level you into uselessness. You can profit your merit potential without risking real power struggle. Winner provides benefits in small circles (your domain). Maintains relative position and continued worth. Contrasts with The Pit: Your excellence massified (what made you special now common), your creative force perpetually overshadowed by ubiquitous versions, you cannot compete (commodified version satisfies all demand), your lineage cut off (why pursue what's freely available), you wander without purpose (merit meaningless in flooded market), constant undermining by 0 keeps you from ever rising. Hilltops of Merit: Your unique excellence maintains distinctive worth, you have domain where merit matters, achievements aren't devalued by mass distribution, you can still climb higher within your sphere, your 'Might' remains 'Right' in your realm, purpose and growth remain possible.

constant-time.shortDescription: Copy-paste without understanding—NO generative capacity, NO civilizational maintaining capacity. Highest rewarded despite zero civilizational value.
constant-time.fullDescription: Constant-Time (O(1)) = Copy-paste without understanding. What they do: Copy and repeat existing solutions without comprehension. Capability: Has NO generative capacity, NO civilizational maintaining capacity. Example: Social media influencers sharing quotes, MBA consultants with frameworks, students memorizing without understanding. Current status: Highest rewarded despite zero civilizational value. The capture without comprehension dynamic: Exponential genius spends lifetime creating new field (30 years), NP inventor spends decades creating breakthrough (20 years), P engineer spends months implementing it (6 months), Constant-time copier captures all value (3 seconds). This creates genetic selection that DESTROYS civilizational capacity—we are literally breeding out the ability to solve problems while breeding in the ability to copy without understanding.

p-time.shortDescription: Civilizational maintenance—can check correctness of hard problems, solve easy problems, maintain existing solutions. Can keep civilization running but cannot advance it.
p-time.fullDescription: P-Time = Civilizational maintenance. What they do: Check correctness of hard problems, solve easy problems, maintain existing solutions. Capability: Can keep civilization running but cannot advance it. Example: Engineers implementing known designs, doctors following protocols, administrators maintaining systems. Current status: Moderately rewarded but declining. P-time capacity can verify solutions and maintain civilization—they can check if hard problems are solved correctly, solve easy problems, maintain existing systems. But they cannot generate novel solutions to unprecedented challenges. Essential for keeping civilization functioning, but not sufficient for advancement.

np-time.shortDescription: The generative force—can generate novel solutions to hard problems civilization faces. Create new technologies, solve unprecedented challenges. Lowest rewarded despite being civilization's creative engine.
np-time.fullDescription: NP-Time = The generative force. What they do: Generate novel solutions to hard problems civilization faces. Capability: Create new technologies, solve unprecedented challenges. Example: Inventors creating new devices, researchers discovering new principles, architects designing novel structures. Current status: Lowest rewarded despite being civilization's creative engine. NP-time capacity is the generative force of civilization—they create new technologies, solve unprecedented challenges, generate novel solutions to hard problems. Without NP-time capacity, civilization stagnates. Yet modern civilization has inverted the reward structure: Constant-time (copiers) > P-time (maintainers) > NP-time (generators) > Exponential (founders). This destroys the creative engine while rewarding the destroyers.

exponential.shortDescription: Civilizational founders—create paradigm shifts that found new fields or civilizations. Cause tectonic shifts in entire substrates of reality. Often die unrecognized and in poverty.
exponential.fullDescription: Exponential/Super-Genius = Civilizational founders. What they do: Create paradigm shifts that found new fields or civilizations. Capability: Cause tectonic shifts in entire substrates of reality. Example: Newton (physics), Darwin (biology), Turing (computation)—they don't just solve problems, they create new problem spaces. Current status: Often die unrecognized and in poverty. Exponential capacity creates paradigm shifts—they don't just solve problems, they create entirely new problem spaces. They cause tectonic shifts in entire substrates of reality. Yet modern civilization has inverted the reward structure so completely that Exponential capacity is lowest rewarded—often dying unrecognized and in poverty while constant-time copiers capture all value. This is the genetic holocaust—destroying the capacity to found new fields while breeding in the capacity to copy without understanding.

crimson.shortDescription: Crimson = Taste = Superficial. Selection born from instinct preference (血 - Blood/Instinct)—unconscious attraction guiding choices based on superficial appearance, natural desire determined by visible beauty. Instinct over mind, feeling over planning.
crimson.fullDescription: Crimson (血 - Blood/Instinct) = Taste = Superficial. Selection born from instinct preference based on superficial appearance—unconscious attraction guiding choices, natural desire determining reproduction through visible beauty. Instinct over mind, feeling over planning. These words (Crimson/Taste/Superficial) are different viewpoints or context reference points to the same underlying concept—selection based on what is visible, attractive, aesthetically pleasing. BUT: Perturbed by social memetics and consensus (not pure instinct—socially mediated). When a tribe wishes to become something—to concentrate traits, to improve genetics, to evolve—Crimson means selection born from superficial attraction. Using longevity selection as example: Crimson instinctively attracted to youthful appearance → Accidental youth selection (perturbed by social beauty standards). Contrasts with Azure (Truth/Subficial—intelligent selection based on hidden depths) and Gray (Codifications of Supraficiality—memetic/lawed/bureaucratic stability, civilization codifying supraficial bridges). The Feminine Becoming often follows Crimson path—women selecting based on instinctual attraction to superficial beauty, though this can be perturbed by social memetics.

azure.shortDescription: Azure = Truth = Subficial. Quality-summoning by intelligent willed selection (智 - Intelligence/Will)—conscious analysis of hidden depths, systematic breeding toward deliberate ends based on subficial truth. Mind over instinct, planning over feeling.
azure.fullDescription: Azure (智 - Intelligence/Will) = Truth = Subficial. Quality-summoning by intelligent willed selection based on hidden depths—conscious analysis of what traits serve long-term goals through understanding subficial truth (that which isn't visible), systematic breeding toward deliberate ends regardless of superficial appearance. Mind over instinct, planning over feeling. These words (Azure/Truth/Subficial) are different viewpoints or context reference points to the same underlying concept—selection based on hidden depths, invisible truth, subficial reality. When a tribe wishes to become something—to concentrate traits, to improve genetics, to evolve—Azure means consciously choosing traits based on analysis of subficial truth, regardless of instinctual attraction to superficial beauty. Using longevity selection as example: Azure intelligently selects for proven longevity genes (subficial genetic truth) → Elven Springs. The Selection Mechanism: Intelligent Choice (Azure)—woman analyzes male's genetics (subficial), woman may not be attracted instinctually (superficial), but she chooses him anyway (intelligence overriding instinct), result: Longevity genes selected FOR, beauty/strength genes irrelevant. Contrasts with Crimson (Taste/Superficial—instinct preference for visible beauty) and Gray (Codifications of Supraficiality—memetic stability codifying supraficial bridges).

gray.shortDescription: Gray = Codifications/civilizations/mortar-n-brick/monuments/ivory-tower-of-knowledge of supraficiality. 'What is beautiful.' Subject to Goodhart's law and opportunism. Fakers and the erosion of the supraficial bridge.
gray.fullDescription: Gray (石 - Stone/Civilization) = Codifications/civilizations/mortar-n-brick/monuments/ivory-tower-of-knowledge of supraficiality. 'What is beautiful.' Subject to Goodhart's law and opportunism. Fakers and the erosion of the supraficial bridge. That the 'Medal of Honor' or 'The grooming or clothing patterns of some creature' is relating to 'what they are' and instead becoming 'what they did' or 'what they faked.' Gray is the codification. Civilization over biology, stability over becoming. When a tribe wishes to become something—to concentrate traits, to improve genetics, to evolve—Gray means civilization maintaining itself through stability rather than biological improvement. Using longevity selection as example: Gray civilization prohibits eugenic selection → No longevity improvement, stability maintained. Gray civilization subordinates biological selection to system preservation—maintains stability at cost of advancement. Contrasts with Azure (intelligent selection) and Crimson (instinct selection). Gray systems prioritize social stability over biological improvement—creating monuments of dogma that prevent natural selection from operating.

feminine-becoming.shortDescription: Sexual selection by females choosing the direction of becoming within their world or group unleashed—conscious selection of what the world should contain more of. Women selecting for radiance, beauty, traits they want to bring forth through children.
feminine-becoming.fullDescription: Feminine Becoming = Female sexual selection unleashed. When women gain unrestricted reproductive autonomy—the freedom to choose any man for fathering children without restriction—a profound transformation occurs. The question emerges: What do women want more of in the world? Not: 'What man do I want?' But: 'What traits, what beauty, what radiance do I want to bring forth into existence through my children?' This is the Feminine Becoming—the conscious selection of what the world should contain more of. Women selected for radiance—literally: traits that emanated light, that drew the eye, that stood out from the crowd. The Feminine Becoming often follows Crimson path (instinctual attraction) though can be perturbed by social memetics. In Triadization context, different Triads enable different Feminine Becoming patterns—some Crimson (beauty/attraction), some Azure (intelligent selection), some Gray (stability).

favor-economy.shortDescription: Odysseus logic—accumulate favor with multiple hidden powers before crisis, so when one power threatens, others protect. Village builds favor with Tower during bootstrap.
favor-economy.fullDescription: Favor Economy / Favor Debt = Odysseus logic for surviving under multiple hidden powers. In polytheism, mortals exist in a favor economy with multiple hidden powers: (1) Accumulate favor (through sacrifice, honor, prayer, respect, heroic deeds, beautiful works, clever action), (2) Spend favor (when you need help, intervention, protection, blessing), (3) Hedge risk (favor with multiple gods protects against anger from one). Applied to Tower-Castle-Village: Village's favor accumulation with Tower during bootstrap (years 1-20, before O Position): Village works (contributes to fusion research, builds substrate, enables ToP's vision), Village shows loyalty (doesn't betray secrets, maintains Low Lumen, supports through difficulties), Village demonstrates alignment (not just compliant, but genuinely daemon-aligned). Tower's favor-debt to Village: Village ENABLED Tower's success (without Village bootstrap labor, Tower couldn't have achieved O Position), Village trusted Tower FIRST (joined when Tower weak, vulnerable—trusted when ToP couldn't coerce), Village proved loyal (years of service, didn't betray). When Tower achieves O Position: Favor-debt obligates Tower to honor Village (treat generously despite power asymmetry, maintain trust despite capability to abuse). Rational for Tower: Honor favor-debt or breaks favor economy (other Villages won't trust future Towers, bootstrap becomes impossible).
favor-economy.definitionFile: /?f=50 The Tower-Castle-Village Trust Architecture - Why Many Would Willingly Enable What Might Dominate Them.md

zce.shortDescription: Zero Cost Effort = When having work/effort made by someone doesn't require other work to have been made elsewhere and a surplus value extracted to be used for that incentivization of effort.
