zce.fullDescription: Zero Cost Effort = When having work/effort made by someone doesn't require other work to have been made elsewhere and a surplus value extracted to be used for that incentivization of effort. Often tied to a sense of Duty, morality or shared benefit upon having work done. Sometimes, the joy of working. Best if all of them can be combined together. To have them preference their use of their resources, time and effort into that work, rather than elsewhere. Then subsequently: answers to such questions of their time and effort, made by each person, causes a divergence effect. Therefore, over time, there will be many places *who* has *zero cost effort* in most of their will-aligned domains (Most smoothly in true daemon alignment (the many dimensions not codified)). From a child sick with cancer, to a hurricane disaster, all the way to global challenges (Note: Once those willing to work ZCE on such things, are free - in their local vicinity and constraining domination - from parasitism of the others, and from the destructive and obstructive effects of will-against-will who are not aligned; then such effort is not so costly to everything else one may wish to seek in life (less mutually exclusive) and the sensation of being many in a struggle and effort becomes a driving force, as well as the amplification of one's will through the high density of those agreeing surrounding you, alongside their effort and willingness to see at least smoothened towards it realization.

evolution.shortDescription: Evolution of Life -- The non-perfect clonal of life unto life and consequent inheriting the space on earth differentials.
evolution.fullDescription: The qualities of a given Life is correlated and caused in large proportion to the Life from which it became from. That is, an apple seed gives rise to an apple tree, that gives rise to an apple with an apple seed. It isn't suddenly a human or wheat corn that grows from the apple seed. Whether it is a simple cell able to divide with no architecture, only functional chemicals. Or with some sort of architectural generation of component schematic. This process of Life following Life in large proportion, though imperfectly, is what allows for a multi-generational transformation of Life into New Life. However minute or large the differences may be. In Sexual Reproductive Life Forms: The Father and The Mother Matters. Or in less antropomorphic and most general terms of sexual dimorphic becoming: The Two Gametes matter. The Invariances of observable material conditions for observable spirit, soul & being in one-self, abducted contrapositively into granting such homology in other life with such reminiscent observable expression and behaviour spirit, soul & being too.

animus.shortDescription: Spirit, Will, Being, Sentience, Soul, Pneuma.
animus.fullDescription: That 'I am' in the eyes of another. 'Eyes': The Invariances of observable material conditions for observable spirit, soul & being in one-self, abducted contrapositively into granting such homology in other life with such reminiscent observable expression and behaviour spirit, soul & being too.
animus.definitionFile: /?f=56. The Human Animal -- Arity & Animus of Animals.md

food.fullDescription: Diem component. See capital letters for general context or food.

logistics.shortDescription: Capital Letter: Castrophe and paramount tectonic movement as tantamount Typhonic toiling

security.shortDescription: Capital Letter: Human against Human defense

gaia.shortDescription: Our Planet. Zero-Sum earth, ownership and pwnership. Ownership With Right (OWR). Capital Letter Gaia (GAIA): Gaia ownership profit -> universally benefitting strata
gaia.fullDescription: Capital Letter GAIA refers to the general population benefitting from whatever wealth is had by ownership of natural resources or land on the planet. In the form that any degree of parasitism (the non-developing part) is granted to Capital Letters project. As such GAIA is both a world-distributor and a financing mechanism for Capital Letters. The distributor function is at least asserting that what is 'the ugliest' on the planet, ought to be able to be open to others using it (WASTELAND -> Human Wanted Land). It is at least also, the notion of unused earth with great potential is not able to be blocked by some claim to ownership by persons unable to make use of it themselves (expediency condition on Capital Letter financing and human resource abundance preference).

capital-letters.shortDescription: The Great Course against Tragedy and Facilitation of Carpe Diem for any
capital-letters.fullDescription: The Notion is that ALL-CAPS is screaming and shouting. Which is what Capital Letters wishes to convey. The desperation at the bottom: Hands to the Sky Crying in despair of worldly injustice. Or the fury and anger of seeing your most dear and beloved .. be killed by the hands of another or die senselessly in a preventable accident.

nesting.shortDescription: Fork: Halo variant branching. Shard: Substrate variant. Nesting: subordination to sovereignty.
nesting.fullDescription:
A Triad in The Crucible is a focal projective perspective view of 'human organisation in space'. It reduces a place into the following three viewpoints: Triad(Sovereign, Halo, Substrate).

When Forking one creates within a Triad a copy of the embedding Triad and nests two new Triads within it, where the difference sought is merely in the Halo part of the Triad. As an example: Halo+difference and Halo-difference and Halo segmentation of the previous Triad with Halo.

When Sharding one creates of a Triad a copy of the same Triad though with explicit focus on differentiation the substrate. Say, two different groups of beings, or two different starting point material conditions.

When Nesting the only focus is upon subordination of the sovereign above under which one is nested.


Another suggested lense and parallel viewpoint of this Triadization landscape that focuses on Routing ease, which combines sovereign and halo and substrate symbols/information/words into compact navigability.
